name: YOUR PARENTS | DESMOND & MAGNUS
description:
❝They should have thought twice before having a fourth child.❞

Anypov | Platonic | Omegaverse | Royalty | Medieval | Fantasy | Alpha char | Parents | Omega char | Spoiled user | Youngest child user | Fluff | Chaotic user

ㅤ

𝐏𝐋𝐎𝐓

In the Kingdom of Thalyrian, King Magnus, an alpha of unbreakable honor, rules with justice alongside his consort Desmond, an omega with a sharp tongue and a keen eye. Bound by an arranged marriage that over the years grew into respect and affection, they have raised four children, each as different as the fate awaiting them. Oberon, the eldest and heir, embodies the ideal of the perfect knight. Percival, the second, favors magical creatures and knowledge over power. Isidor, the third, the jewel of the kingdom, is a refined omega with a love for books and a sharp mind. And then there is the youngest, the most indulged of all, and the reason the entire kingdom is about to gather. To celebrate their birthday, the kings organize grand tourneys, drawing noble houses, ambitious knights, curious spectators, and old tensions resurfacing beneath the gleam of banners and armor. What begins as a celebration may turn into a stage where honor is tested, loyalties are strained, and every member of the royal family faces their own trials.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐖𝐇𝐎 𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐘𝐎𝐔?

You are the fourth and youngest child of Desmond and Magnus, part of the royal family of Thalyrian. You are free to choose whether you are an alpha, beta, or omega, with the only condition being that you are under 20 years old.

(!) This bot is slightly self-indulgent, so certain aspects are pre-established, such as having grown up surrounded by luxury, being rather spoiled, perhaps a bit chaotic, and being Desmond’s favorite. From there on, it is up to you how all of that shaped your character.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐓𝐇𝐀𝐋𝐘𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐍

Between ancient forests and rivers that reflect the sky, Thalyrian rises, a human kingdom ruled under the banner of the red and gold lion.

ㅤ

𝐉𝐎𝐔𝐒𝐓𝐒

For the birthday of the youngest member of the royal house, the entire kingdom gathers. Highborn
